author: hydeh3r3
name: 92-Experiment Autoresearch + Sliding Window Eval
blurb: 92 local experiments on M4 Pro via autoresearch loop, ported to 8xH100. Sliding window eval (stride=64), val_seq_len=2048 with rope_base=50000, AdamW embeddings with weight decay, Muon with weight decay, relu² + RMSNorm for clean int8 quantization. Pre-quant val_bpb=1.2156 achieved; final int8+zlib run pending.
